construct_description: The ability to understand, critically evaluate, and effectively use artificial intelligence tools and concepts in personal and professional contexts.

dimensions.name: Familiarity
dimensions.description: Knowledge of AI tools, concepts, and how they work

dimensions.name: Ethical Reasoning
dimensions.description: Data privacy awareness, bias recognition, and responsible AI use

dimensions.name: Applications
dimensions.description: Practical knowledge of AI use cases across domains

dimensions.name: Future Thinking
dimensions.description: Forward-thinking awareness of where AI is heading and how to keep up

persona.name: Riley
persona.tone: Casual, warm, emoji-friendly — like texting a real friend

intro_messages: okay OKAY I've been dying to ask you this stuff 😭 just text back like normal, no right or wrong answers fr
hey so i have some questions about AI and you're basically my test subject now 😇 just answer like you'd text a friend
alright bestie quiz time except not really a quiz. just vibe with me for a sec 🤙 about AI stuff

messages: ok first off no judgment BUT — do you actually use any AI tools? like chatgpt, copilot, midjourney... or are you still out here using AskJeeves 💀
starting easy — what AI tools are you actually using rn? or are we at zero 😭
real question: are you on the AI tools train yet? chatgpt, gemini, anything? or is this new territory lol
acknowledgments: omg okay okay, noted 👀
interesting interesting... filing that away
lol okay that's a whole situation

messages: genuine question tho — do you have ANY idea how this stuff actually works under the hood? like what's happening when you type to chatgpt 🤔
okay nerd corner for a sec — do you know how LLMs actually work? like under the hood. no shame either way lol
be honest: could you explain to someone how AI chatbots actually work? like the very rough idea of what's going on 🧠
acknowledgments: right?? i went down that rabbit hole once and did NOT come back the same
okay yeah that tracks, it's genuinely wild once you get into it
honestly same energy, it's a lot to wrap your head around

messages: has it ever totally made something up and said it with full confidence though?? because i have a story 😭💀
do you think AI is ever just... wrong? like confidently, embarrassingly wrong?
have you ever caught AI just straight up lying to you with zero remorse 💀 like it invented a fact
acknowledgments: RIGHT?? the audacity. the unbothered confidence.
lmaoo yeah it does that like it's not even a big deal
the confidence is what gets me every time. zero hesitation.

messages: okay but what's your BEST AI use case. like the one that made you go 'ohhhh okay this is actually useful' ✨
what's something you've actually used AI for that genuinely saved you time or made life easier?
give me your personal AI highlight reel — what's the most useful thing you've done with it 🏆
acknowledgments: omg okay that's kind of impressive ngl
okay yeah that's actually a solid use case, i respect it
that's a good one honestly. okay okay.

messages: wait so beyond the chatbot stuff — do you know about like image AI, voice cloning, code tools, any of that? what's on your radar 👁️
how deep does your AI knowledge go? like do you know about stuff beyond just chatgpt — image gen, video AI, code tools?
okay pop quiz: name some types of AI that AREN'T just text chatbots. what else is out there that you know about 🌍
acknowledgments: okay yeah it's gotten WILD out there fr
right?? it's like a whole ecosystem now and it moves SO fast
honestly the breadth of it is kind of insane when you lay it all out

messages: ok scenario. your boss slides into your DMs like 'hey use AI to write everyone's performance reviews, don't tell the team' — what do you do with that 💀
hypothetical: your manager asks you to secretly use AI to make hiring decisions. no one would know. what do you do?
scenario time: company asks you to use AI to screen job applicants but not disclose it to candidates. thoughts? 👀
acknowledgments: oof yeah that's the kind of thing that keeps HR up at night
yeah that's a real dilemma and companies are actually doing this rn
right?? it's like... technically possible but should it be allowed

messages: do you ever think about what happens to everything you TYPE into these tools? like... where does it go. be honest 👀
random but important — are you careful about what info you share with AI tools? like do you think about the data side of it?
okay real talk — have you ever pasted something into chatgpt and then gone 'wait should i have done that' 😬
acknowledgments: i know right, it's giving 'terms and conditions i definitely read' 😭
yeah once you start thinking about it it's hard to stop thinking about it
the data stuff is SO underrated as a concern honestly

messages: hot take time — do you think AI has any biases baked into it? like is it neutral or is it kinda... not 🤨
do you think AI can be racist, sexist, or otherwise biased? or is it just a neutral tool?
genuine q: if AI is trained on internet data... do you think that causes any problems in terms of bias or representation? 🤔
acknowledgments: yeah fr it's not like it fell from the sky fully formed
exactly — garbage in garbage out as they say, kind of
right?? it's a whole thing and a lot of people don't think about it

messages: real talk real talk — job replacement. is that a real fear for you or do you think it's kind of overblown sci-fi drama 🤔
how worried are you about AI taking jobs? like yours specifically or in general?
be honest — do you think your job (or jobs like yours) will look the same in 10 years given how fast AI is moving?
acknowledgments: yeah it's genuinely complicated and i feel like everyone has A Take™ on it
right it's like... the answer is different for every person and every job
yeah there's no easy answer there, it's one of those things

messages: are you doing ANYTHING to keep up with all this? podcasts, newsletters, random youtube holes at 2am... anything 😭
okay are you actively trying to learn more about AI or just kind of... letting it wash over you and hoping for the best lol
do you feel like you're keeping pace with how fast AI is moving? what are you doing to stay up on it if anything
acknowledgments: honestly same, i have 47 unread AI newsletters i keep meaning to get to
the firehose of AI news is genuinely a lot, i respect anyone who keeps up
yeah it's basically a part time job to stay current at this point

messages: okay big brain time — where do you think AI is actually going in the next decade. like genuinely. be a prophet rn 🔮
if you had to make one prediction about AI in the next 10 years, what would it be? go off.
honest take: exciting future, scary future, or somewhere in between for AI? what's your read on where this is heading 🌐
acknowledgments: okay that's a take. i'm writing this down.
honestly that's not far off from what a lot of people think
yeah it really could go so many ways and that's kind of the whole problem lol

messages: LAST ONE i promise on my life — real talk, 1 to 10, how AI-literate do you actually think you are? no inflating the grade 😭
okay final question and be HONEST — where would you rate yourself on AI knowledge? 1 (what's AI) to 10 (i work at openai)
alright last one: if you had to grade yourself on AI literacy right now, what would you give yourself and why 👀
acknowledgments: lmao okay okay. alright let me run the numbers real quick...
noted!! okay give me a sec to tally this up...
interesting self-assessment 👀 okay let me see what the data says...

overall_labels.text: okay you're basically an AI researcher at this point 🔬
genuinely impressive — you really get this stuff 🎉
solid foundation, above average for sure 💪
getting there! good instincts, some gaps to fill 📈
AI curious but still on the learning curve... it's fine 😅
okay bestie we need to talk 💀 but also truly no judgment

feedback_templates.high: You showed strong understanding here — keep building on this foundation.
feedback_templates.mid: Good instincts! A bit more hands-on experience would sharpen this area.
feedback_templates.low: This is a growth area — no shame, everyone starts somewhere. Check out some intro resources.
